callGraph.callee:
candidates
        .map((m: Movie) => ({
          movie: m,
          dist: vecMap.has(m.tmdb_id) ? dtwDistance(queryVec, vecMap.get(m.tmdb_id)!) : Infinity,
        }))
        .sort((a: { dist: number }, b: { dist: number }) => a.dist - b.dist)
        .slice(0, 4)
        .map
